audit_items.proof_trace: The function fails to call nfp_tunnel_del_ipv4_off() and nfp_tunnel_put_ipv6_off() on the error path when nfp_modify_flow_metadata() returns an error (line 1527-1528). Tunnel entry reference counts are not decremented, causing a memory leak that can lead to resource exhaustion.
audit_items.attack_scenario: An attacker can repeatedly trigger flow deletion while racing with stats cleanup to cause nfp_modify_flow_metadata() to fail, leaking tunnel entry references each time and eventually exhausting tunnel table memory.
